title: Light Bridges
description: Simplified, Port of Light Bridges Mod.
body:
# Light Bridges Mod
**Note:** requires Bibliotheca library.

## About
This mod adds a couple of new blocks, a light bridge and door! Now you can create those fancy doors, barriers, and bridges that you see in Halo.

## Recipes
![Craft of the Source Rail Block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3OwNahaq/images/c1a0f25b860435830b082812fecfbb1f71041a1d.jpeg)

Craft of the Source Rail Block.
